label: Ideo symbol pack
description: A set of translated strings used to generate the ideology's name, theme, and member title. Multiple packs are defined; one is chosen at ideology creation.

ideoName.label: Ideo name
ideoName.description: The ideology's primary name word. Used directly when present; falls back to theme. Must be translated.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: The core theme word used when ideoName is absent. Also serves as the primary symbol when ideoName is empty. Must be translated.

adjective.label: Adjective
adjective.description: Adjectival form used in compound ideology names. Must be translated.

member.label: Member
member.description: Title given to ideology members. Must be translated.

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.description: When true, the symbol is used as a name prefix rather than a suffix.
